title: Point Blank - Detachment Pack
body:
This pack detaches attachments from guns that can't normally be removed.

![The SPAS-12 added by Vic's Point Blank lacking a stock and a speedloader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eda955de001646e5927743623867d4a645f7987.png)

I'm doing it all without editing models, so some guns are impossible. It acts as a skin pack.
